blocks.text: Match preview: India face Afghanistan in 1st ODI (ODI) on Sat, 13 Jun, 2026, 1:30 pm at Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium Dharamsala. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: Himachal Pradesh Cricket Association Stadium Dharamsala

blocks.text: Pace and bounce on offer; seamers enjoy early overs.
Variable conditions · High 22°C / Low 16°C · Rain: 13.6 mm · Wind: up to 15 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
